DARV.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-0.ancient: Come on in! You're gonna love that dusty pile o' books over there. I can tell just by the lookin' at ya!
DARV.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-1.char: These enchanted books and magical scrolls... How intriguing! I wish I could spend all day here.
DARV.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-0r.ancien: Aha. So you are the one who loves keepin' things in place.
DARV.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-1r.char:
I do.
Wait, you learned this from [red]Mokou[/red]?
DARV.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-2r.ancien: That's right. She said you are very important to her.
DARV.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.2-0r.ancien: Hey there, bookworm! Got some fine scrolls here with your name all over 'em.
NEOW.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-1.char: I shall do what I can.
NEOW.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-0r.char:
I am tempted to question your motive behind all this.
But history cannot be changed if the Architect still exists.
NONUPEIPE.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-0.an: Look at you, aren't you a dazzling star? Fine knitted dress with beautiful patterns, silvery hair smooth as silk, and that brilliantly designed hat is just the cherry on top.
NONUPEIPE.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-1.ch: That is such a compliment. Thank you, I have no words.
NONUPEIPE.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-2.an: Come here. With my blessing you shall transcend!
NONUPEIPE.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-0r.a:
There is something about your dress that has been perplexing me.
How exactly does it change from [blue]blue[/blue] to [green]green[/green] when you change form?
NONUPEIPE.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-1r.c: Hmmmm... Now that you mentioned it, I have actually never thought of it myself.
NONUPEIPE.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-2r.a:
Interesting. Let's leave it as a mystery shall we?
After all, a secret makes a woman, woman.
NONUPEIPE.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.2-0r.a:
You have returned, looking gorgeous as usual.
No wonder why the [red]Immortal[/red] lady fell for you.
OROBAS.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-0.ancie: Eat history? History food for you?! How taste??
OROBAS.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-1.char:
No, history is not food for me. And I do not know how they taste. My ability simply allows me to conceal them temporarily.
Oh, am I speaking too fast? I can explain again if you want to.
OROBAS.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-0r.char: You remind me of some of my students. Thanks to them, I learned how crucial patience is for a teacher.
OROBAS.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-1r.anci: Yes! Student! I be your student!!
OROBAS.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-2r.char: Of course you can be my student. You are the student with the brightest eye.
OROBAS.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.2-0r.anci:
History teacher! Have this!
Now more lessons!
PAEL.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Calm and collected...
We will get along well.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-1.char:
Gentle and generous.
I am sure we will.
PAEL.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-0r.char:
I noticed that you sleep much longer than the other ancient beings.
Is there a particular reason for that?
PAEL.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-1r.ancien:
[thinky_dots]Sleep nourishes us all. Helps us grow...
Its effects upon me are more... physical, than the others.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-2r.char:
I see.
This makes me wonder why I never need to sleep in [green]Hakutaku[/green] form.
PAEL.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.2-0r.ancien: [thinky_dots]Here, take this. Remember not to overwork yourself...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-0.ancient:
BOOKS? SCROLLS? NO NEED FOR THAT!
WEAPONS ARE ALL YOU NEED!!
TANX.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-1.char: I would very much disagree. Still, I suppose we must agree to disagree.
TANX.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-1r.char:
[thinky_dots](Normally, I would refuse... but tonight is a full moon.)[/thinky_dots]
Just this once.
[i][font_size=22]Keine fights Tanx in her Hakutaku form.[/font_size][/i]
TANX.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.2-0r.ancien: HEAVENLY SWORD? MIGHTY NAME FOR A MIGHTY WEAPON!!
TEZCATARA.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-0.an:
Hello, sweetie. Oh, careful there.
The fire's [jitter][b]nice[/b][/jitter] and [jitter][b]warm[/b][/jitter], but don't let it get too close to your scrolls.
TEZCATARA.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-0r.c: Have you any insight about the history of the Spire?
TEZCATARA.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-1r.a:
Why yes, sweetheart. I have witnessed the fire [jitter][b]rise[/b][/jitter] and [sine][b]wane[/b][/sine].
But I have let the fire consume most of my dull memories, for the better.
TEZCATARA.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-2r.c: Understood. Perhaps it is nice that you can forget, but I will try my best to remember.
TEZCATARA.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.2-0r.a: Some things never change about history. There's always an ancient being with soup.
VAKUU.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-0.ancien:
How are you doing, gorgeous lady?
Anything in particular that you are interested in?
VAKUU.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-1.char:
Do not even attempt to mess with me, wretched demon!
I know what you did, and I am coming right for you after this.
VAKUU.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-2.ancien: The hostility. I'd love to see you try.
VAKUU.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-0r.char: Daring enough to present yourself in front of me again, demon?
VAKUU.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-1r.ancie: You truly believe I should be afraid of you? How cute.
VAKUU.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-2r.char: Stay arrogant if you wish. I cannot recall a single arrogant student who did not eventually beg me for mercy.
VAKUU.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.2-0r.ancie:
I have come to the realization that you are always aggressive no matter what I say.
So suit yourself. I am done trying.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.0-: So you are the source of their suffering. You sought to create history, yet produced only ruin.
You know nothing about my visions.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.1-: Persistent, aren't you? Then I will ensure history forgets you.
Persistent YOU are. A bold threat from a hybrid abomination.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.2-: A creator who abandons responsibility has no right to call themselves a creator. Have you no remorse?
Remorse is for those who believe they have erred.
